sentences.arabic: كَانَ فَارِسٌ يَخَافُ مِنَ التَّحَدُّثِ أَمَامَ زُمَلَائِهِ.
sentences.translation: Faris se bojao govoriti pred drugarima.
sentences.translationEn: Faris was afraid to speak in front of his classmates.

sentences.translation: Koljena su mu se tresla kada bi ustajao.
sentences.translationEn: His knees would tremble when he stood up.

sentences.arabic: تَدَرَّبَ كَثِيرًا أَمَامَ الْمِرْآةِ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogo je vježbao ispred ogledala kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: He practised a lot in front of the mirror at home.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ تَكَلَّمَ بِثِقَةٍ وَصَفَّقَ لَهُ الصَّفُّ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju je govorio s pouzdanjem i razred mu je pljesko.
sentences.translationEn: In the end he spoke confidently and the class applauded him.
